text: Pick up the red apple from the table and place it in the bowl.
Move the blue cup to the left side of the counter.
Stack the green block on top of the yellow block.
Open the drawer and retrieve the spoon from inside.
Push the can toward the edge of the table without knocking it off.
Pick up the water bottle and pour its contents into the glass.
Sort the colored balls by placing each one in the matching colored bin.
Wipe the surface of the table with the cloth from left to right.
Close the laptop lid gently without pressing any keys.
Pick up the banana and place it next to the orange on the plate.
